word: Geh, du alter Esel, hole Fische

senses.gloss: Merkspruch für die Dur-Tonarten mit ♯-Vorzeichen: G-Dur (1♯), D-Dur (2♯), A-Dur (3♯), E-Dur (4♯), H-Dur (5♯) und Fis-Dur (6♯)
senses.gloss_en: go get fish you old donkey
senses.gloss_en_full: A mnemonic for the major keys with sharp accidentals: G major (1♯), D major (2♯), A major (3♯), E major (4♯), B major (5♯), and F♯ major (6♯).
